---
title: "Ensemble Kalman filtering and conditional normalizing flows for seismic monitoring via data assimilation"
categories: [data assimilation, machine learning, julia]
image: "diagram.png"
date: 12/4/2025
---


Ensemble Kalman filtering and conditional normalizing flows for seismic monitoring via data assimilation (2023 - 2025)

- Applied the ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) to estimate subsurface CO~2~ concentrations using surface seismic observations in a realistic setting.
- Compared EnKF to a class of scalable conditional normalizing flow filters based on neural networks with coupling layers.
- Redesigned the parametrization of the coupling layer to be more robust to weight initialization and data noise.

Code [here](https://github.com/DataAssimilation)
